summary: Combines two or more texture inputs using blend operations (Over, Add, Multiply, Screen, etc.). The workhorse for layering images and building visual composites.

key_params.name: operand
key_params.note: Blend mode: Over, Under, Add, Subtract, Multiply, Screen, etc.

key_params.name: opacity
key_params.note: Master opacity for the compositing operation (0-1)

key_params.name: prefit
key_params.note: How to handle resolution mismatches between inputs

common_gotchas: Input order matters: the first input is the background, subsequent inputs composite on top.
Ensure both inputs have matching resolution and pixel format to avoid unexpected scaling or clamping.
